ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Continued To Dec-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for (administrators) Jaleel Rahman & Terrence Farr.

Ms. Rasch reported that the petition is done, that it was sent to her clients for signature but she has been unable to get a response from Mr. Farr, that last week he stated he would sign and send the petition at the end of the week but it has not been received and she asks that an Order to Appear be issued to Mr. Farr. The status on filing a petition for final distribution was continued to December 27, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (136 Bradford St, Sf Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for the Administrators.

The sale of 100% interest was confirmed at $1,225,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 6/26/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required. Status of filing receipt for funds into a blocked account is set for August 18, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
